title: Feitiço do Império
writer: António Lopes Ribeiro, Joaquim Mota Jr.
actors: Luís de Campos, Isabel Tovar, Alves da Cunha
plot: Luís immigrated to the USA and intends to become an American. But after his father invites him on a journey to the Portuguese territories in Africa, he will find true love, and also learn to value his country and its colonial gran...
